text: Being here, I feel curious and inspired. The first scene, looking into a glass-walled room with people absorbed in a lecture or meeting, fills me with a sense of quiet observation and contemplation. The second scene, with its vibrant "R + D" signage and interactive displays, invites my mind to engage with ideas about research and development. I am drawn to think about the nature of innovation, learning, and our perpetual quest to understand and improve the world. There is a gentle hum of intellectual pursuit all around me, and I feel fortunate to witness it.
